summary: Phase 3 Candidate Registration & Dashboard Testing Complete. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend login flow, dashboard, and profile form working correctly. Minor UI issue with broken logo image.

ui_bugs.issue: Logo image returns 403 Forbidden - shows broken image icon

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Returns correct structure with access_token and user
GET /api/auth/me - Returns user data with valid token
GET /api/portal/candidate/dashboard - Returns stats (has_profile, active_projects, unread_notifications, documents_count)
GET /api/portal/candidate/profile - Returns profile or null message
POST /api/auth/candidate/ocr/passport - Endpoint exists and handles errors gracefully
POST /api/auth/candidate/ocr/cv - Endpoint exists and handles errors gracefully
Frontend login page loads with email/password form
Frontend login redirects to /portal/candidate after successful login
Frontend candidate dashboard displays stats and profile completion
Frontend profile form has 5 tabs (Personal, Familie, Experiență, Documente, Adițional)
action_items: Fix logo image URL - currently returns 403 Forbidden (LOW priority)
critical_code_review_comments: CandidateProfileForm.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
DocumentsUpload.jsx has good file validation and replace confirmation dialog
OCR endpoints properly handle errors and return structured responses
All API endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses

success_rate.frontend: 95% (login, dashboard, profile form working; logo broken)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 candidate registration features are working. Backend APIs for OCR, profile, documents, and dashboard all functional. Frontend React app displays candidate portal correctly. The Next.js app (/app/frontend-next) is built but not deployed as primary frontend yet - React app (/app/frontend) is the live frontend.

backend_apis.candidate_ocr_passport: WORKING (returns error for invalid input as expected)
backend_apis.candidate_ocr_cv: WORKING (returns error for invalid input as expected)
